name: Elaris Moonshadow
sd_appearance: graceful half-elf figure, slightly taller than human, with subtly pointed ears and a lithe, sinewy build, their silver-streaked black hair cropped short around a jagged scar slicing the left scalp, eyes sharp and pale gold like fractured amber, skin bronzed from underground forges; layered in weathered leather harnesses over scale-mail that glints faintly with rusted iron, one hand gripping a splintered warhammer, the other holding a crossbow slung across their back, a faded serpent tattoo coiled around a dagger peeking from beneath torn sleeve, its edges smudged with ash and soot.
faction_visual: eclectic mix, deliberately no faction marks, one defining personal item
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
